_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Architecture Diagram renders twice on Code page; inline copy unreadable in dark mode

steps.description: Stop emitting the trailing '## Architecture Diagram' block in MapGenerator._assemble_markdown; add a defensive strip helper applied in _render_architecture_html so legacy stored docs render only one diagram
Review S01: mapgen content correctness, strip helper conservatism (trailing H2 only), idempotency, no regression for docs without the section
Write unit tests for _assemble_markdown + strip helper, plus a dashboard reproduction test asserting exactly one mermaid container on the Code page
Review S03: semantic correctness, falsifiability of the mermaid-count assertion, regression coverage of strip helper edges
Cross-step review — mapgen change + render-time guard + tests compose into a complete fix; integration tests pass end-to-end
QV: Browser verification — Code page renders exactly one architecture diagram, readable in both themes
